publicSideBand: City Utilities coordinates utility-managed replacement at no direct charge during city grant-funded lead projects
privateSideBand: Project-area homeowners can receive free replacement while owner-requested or out-of-area work may involve private-side contractor cost
fullReplacementBand: Full replacement is no direct charge in grant-funded project areas and cost varies outside those target areas
housingTypeAssumption: Fort Wayne publishes grant-funded lead replacement language rather than contractor bid ranges
permitAssumption: Eligibility depends on the city's lead page survey project area and replacement scheduling
restorationAssumption: Restoration scope follows city contractor work and the city water quality team coordinates follow-up testing
methodologySummary: Fort Wayne anchors cost in selected grant-funded neighborhood projects rather than a citywide quote and ties replacement coverage to the remove-lead program's area-based rollout and utility coordination.
ownerTriggerSummary: Owners avoid direct cost only when the property is inside a funded Fort Wayne replacement area and the city schedules the work rather than leaving the owner to pursue an out-of-area contractor path.
